nasb.text: You shall make the poles of acacia wood and overlay them with gold, so that with them the table may be carried.

esv.text: You shall make the poles of acacia wood, and overlay them with gold, and the table shall be carried with these.

cnv.text: 你要用皂莢木做幾根桌槓，又要用金包裹起來，桌子要用桌槓來抬。

ccb.text: 两根横杠要用皂荚木制作，外面包金，用来抬桌子。
